TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: João Lourenço ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 3, João Lourenço, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Angola ta' misuw hya' ga João Lourenço, aring ryax tay 26 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *o*o louren*o rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *o*o louren*o, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw aŋola taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *o*o louren*o, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: João Lourenço ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 3, João Lourenço, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Angola ta' misuw hya' ga João Lourenço, aring ryax tay 26 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *o*o louren*o rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *o*o louren*o, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw aŋola taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *o*o louren*o, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
